session_focus: Persist cycle_count and design_graph.last_cycle so loop metrics do not freeze.
user_directives: Persist cycle_count and design_graph.last_cycle so loop metrics do not freeze.
assistant_responses: Persisted cycle_count on every loop pass and synchronized design_graph last_cycle and last_updated. Variant 63 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Telemetry that depends on ephemeral in-memory counters will drift from repo truth.

Data artifacts were growing while loops_executed remained stale because config and graph state were not being advanced reliably. Variant 63 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
